mission.name: Ferry landing page + launch one-pager
mission.objective: Ship a single-page marketing site and a launch one-pager for Ferry (expiring file-share links), built to local/staging in test mode, validated by 2 personas, consistent across both deliverables.

definition_of_done.item: Winning concept selected and audited (positioning, hero, 3 value props, CTA)
Landing page built to local (index.html, responsive, click-through, test-mode signup)
Launch one-pager built (audience, 3 channels, pre-launch checklist)
2 persona tests run, findings synthesized, ship/iterate decision
Run report + retrospective delivered, lessons written to the ledger

compliance: test mode only: no real signup/payment/email capture

preflight.notes: Tier 1 staging build. Agents need file-write (implementation, website-build) and read access: available. Research wave skipped, grounding pre-supplied in blueprint. No external tools required.

dispatches.brief_summary: Frame Ferry positioning + page concept: positioning line, hero, 3 value props, primary CTA
dispatches.dependency_reason: no dependencies; opening concept off the blueprint grounding

dispatches.brief_summary: Build index.html landing page from the chosen concept; test-mode signup
dispatches.dependency_reason: needs the audited concept from wave 1

dispatches.brief_summary: Build the launch one-pager (audience, 3 channels, pre-launch checklist)
dispatches.dependency_reason: needs the audited concept from wave 1; independent of the website build

warnings: Positioning sentence lives in the one-pager, not verbatim on the page; correct placement, not drift
Unvalidated assumption: expiry reads as relief not loss; testers must probe with the scripted safer-or-nervous question and confirm the reassurance line lands

dispatches.brief_summary: Persona: freelance designer sending a client a one-off file. Click-through + a11y on the built page.
dispatches.dependency_reason: needs the built page from wave 2

dispatches.brief_summary: Persona: privacy-conscious first-timer who distrusts file-share tools. Trust + clarity read.
dispatches.dependency_reason: needs the built page from wave 2

warnings: Test-wave synthesis verdict was ITERATE; mapped to BLOCK because run-state gate.verdict enum lacks SHIP/ITERATE vocabulary (see improvement proposal)
Both personas: task not completed, would not buy as-is

fixes_routed.fix: Make the disabled CTA an active Create-demo-link that reveals/copies the existing fake link ferry.link/demo-7k2p9 with a Copied confirmation; no upload, no network
Add a visible focus-visible style for .modal-close and the modal chips
Append an honest file-removed-on-expiry line to the reassurance copy and add a demo Privacy placeholder link in the footer; no fabricated SLA/GDPR/residency claim

waves.purpose: iterate (route wave-3 test fixes to website-build; retry 1 of 2 on this branch)

dispatches.brief_summary: Apply the 5 auditor-routed fixes: active demo Create-link, AA contrast on --muted + expiry-tag, modal focus styles, honest reassurance + demo Privacy link
dispatches.dependency_reason: iterate on the wave-3 ITERATE verdict; same website branch, attempt 2

waves.purpose: retrospect (optimizer strategic read; meta-step, exempt from dispatch cap)

dispatches.brief_summary: Strategic read over the whole run for the retrospective and ledger lessons
dispatches.dependency_reason: runs after the final gate; mines the completed run
